creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you submit this as a patch? created with diff -ruN? and attached to 
the pr (email it to bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, subject Re: ports/169140: 
MAINTAINER UPDATE: news/sabnzbdplus 0.7.0)

shars are for new ports only.

updates need patches so that the committer, and audits can see what 
exact changes were made.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
